description: Trigger accuracy queries for the skill-evaluator skill. Tests that it fires for concrete skill evaluation, trigger validation, baseline comparison, and input-size measurement requests, and stays silent for editing, planning, review, or generic debugging work.

should_trigger.query: evaluate the dataviz skill and report structural failures plus input size
should_trigger.note: explicit evaluate request with a named skill

should_trigger.query: run evals for plan-it and tell me whether the skill adds value over baseline
should_trigger.note: eval request plus baseline comparison intent

should_trigger.query: check whether implement-it triggers correctly for should-trigger and should-not-trigger prompts

should_not_trigger.query: improve the dataviz skill instructions to make them shorter
should_not_trigger.note: editing a skill belongs to implementation/planning, not evaluation

should_not_trigger.query: review the skill-evaluator runner code for bugs
debug why the checkout test is failing
should_not_trigger.note: generic debugging request, not a skill evaluation
